sentence_text: Daily task include analysing market opportunities to come up with product ideas that suits the market trend and customer's needs and preferences.
cons_text: No lunch break as we work through lunch hours, managing people's expectations and patience
pros_text: Good benefits, supportive management, good remuneration and rewards
review_body_text: Daily task include analysing market opportunities to come up with product ideas that suits the market trend and customer's needs and preferences. With this, I have learn to adapt to the changing market environment and work under pressure as a split second would cost a lost of opportunity or money position for the clients. My managers : Margaret, Steven and Mr Khoo had been really supportive when it comes to product approvals and recognition of one's efforts. I have been generously rewarded for the handwork that I have shown and this enhances and boost my morale values. I work with a team of 10 other people who carries the same role. We each exhibit a strong cooperation system and there's a buddy system in tact which enables one to have a back up if any unforeseen circumstances prevail. The hardest part of the job is when we have a bad day at the market, where most indices dropped or the currencies are taking a beating, it is the mental and emotional position of our clients that we would need to manage eg. being shouted at or even enduring tantrums and anger hurled at you and our job would be to pacify the clients and offer alternative solutions. The most enjoyable part would definitely be monetary. Being an employee on both basic salary and monthly incentives, the money is the pull factor. I am accountable for what I bring home extra every month and when you do your best, the satisfaction is there when you bring home a big fat paycheque. I have learn a lot working in UOB, a lot of opportunities was given to me. Steven in particular was nurturing me and guiding me for a managerial role, I was exposed to all the numerical and analytical tasks and meetings and presentations to help me understand the business better and how to run a treasury advisory team, ensuring we are using our team budget accordingly. It was definitely something that made me realise my talent and the opportunity to learn.
review_title: Challenging workforce withroom for growth and career progression

My managers : Margaret, Steven and Mr Khoo had been really supportive when it comes to product approvals and recognition of one's efforts. I have been generously rewarded for the handwork that I have shown and this enhances and boost my morale values. I work with a team of 10 other people who carries the same role. We each exhibit a strong cooperation system and there's a buddy system in tact which enables one to have a back up if any unforeseen circumstances prevail. The hardest part of the job is when we have a bad day at the market, where most indices dropped or the currencies are taking a beating, it is the mental and emotional position of our clients that we would need to manage eg. being shouted at or even enduring tantrums and anger hurled at you and our job would be to pacify the clients and offer alternative solutions. The most enjoyable part would definitely be monetary. Being an employee on both basic salary and monthly incentives, the money is the pull factor. I am accountable for what I bring home extra every month and when you do your best, the satisfaction is there when you bring home a big fat paycheque. I have learn a lot working in UOB, a lot of opportunities was given to me. Steven in particular was nurturing me and guiding me for a managerial role, I was exposed to all the numerical and analytical tasks and meetings and presentations to help me understand the business better and how to run a treasury advisory team, ensuring we are using our team budget accordingly. It was definitely something that made me realise my talent and the opportunity to learn.
review_title: Challenging workforce withroom for growth and career progression

cons_text: Requre a lot of patience and resilience
review_body_text: Job required answering phone calls and emails related to credit card matters. It was shift work that included weekdays and weekends. There were always difficult and unreasonable customers and it was a challenge to meet their demands. Some days lunch/dinner/rest breaks were curtailed to meet the backlog of calls. There were appreciative customers who would call/write in to thank the staff for assistance in resolving their issues.. Management were helpful and supportive but kept us on our toes all the time.
review_title: A challenging job with great benefits

sentence_text: Working with Maybank Berhad in credit card department was a such great experience to gained.
cons_text: The salary is not worth with the job. Should increase the salary.
pros_text: Can improve the communication skill and solving problem. Besides, the job taught me to be more patient in confronting the customers.
review_body_text: Working with Maybank Berhad in credit card department was a such great experience to gained. It taught me on how to be more patient especially confronting customers via telephone. It also improve my communication skills, interpersonal skills, and computer skills. I also got the chance on how to read customers' credit card statements. However, instead of good things that I got during working with Maybank Credit Card, there were also bad things happened in the office, which is the office culture. The credit card department operating via telephone so, there were times where the senior employee pass the telephone to the junior employee because they do not want to entertain the customers and solve their problems. I hope the problems of bad office culture can be solved in the future and the higher authority of the company could play their roles.
review_title: Fun but the office culture is not healthy

sentence_text: Perform financial analysis in terms of fundamental of a company to assess the fair value of a share price.
review_body_text: Perform financial analysis in terms of fundamental of a company to assess the fair value of a share price. Update with current issues (read news, briefing from manager) and be alert on the fluctuation of financial markets. Consult research report from award winning house CIMB research to equipped myself with current stock picks and trading ideas and report to clients as well as monitor clients’ investments portfolio. Communicate with different clients with different investment objectives, and cooperate with back office (operation) to ensure effective operation work is accomplished Be extra cautious/alert while keying orders to prevent errors while receiving instruction from client because when money is concern, it takes a great deal of responsibility to handle clients needs. sentence_text: I was an intern in the Equity capital markets department, CIMB Investment Bank, Malaysia for a duration of two months in early 2013.
review_body_text: I was an intern in the Equity capital markets department, CIMB Investment Bank, Malaysia for a duration of two months in early 2013. I was involved in the Ranhill IPO, whereby I helped to create a teaser of the IPO for presentation to cornerstone investors, describing the company's strengths, strategies, industry dynamics and growth prospects. Not only that, I also assisted with creation, editing, and analysis of documents by compelling industry and company data, performing basic financial analysis, and creating presentation documents. Being involved in prospectus launches for various IPOs allowed me to understand corporate finance better. Although the working hours were long, I enjoyed learning about the fusion of marketing and finance.
review_title: Summer Internship in CIMB Investment Bank

sentence_text: Daily market monitoring and get updates from the investment and treasury specialist in order to spot investment opportunities for clients.
pros_text: Great colleagues and enjoyable work environment
review_body_text: Daily market monitoring and get updates from the investment and treasury specialist in order to spot investment opportunities for clients. Meanwhile, to assist clients with their daily transaction, eg. fixed deposit placement, telegraphic transfer, etc. Teamwork and communication is vital especially in your absence, keeping everyone informed about your whereabouts is your responsibility because this ensures that everything runs without hiccups. Multi-tasking was learned throughout the 4 years work experience in UOB, to combat with high expectation from superiors and customers. Quick adaption to change was developed because of the consistent changes in supervisors, management and salary payout structure. Ever-ready to help colleagues made this place one of the most enjoyable environment to work and grow in. Everyone treated each other with respect made working in a multiracial environment very pleasant.

sentence_text: One of the top 5 bank in Malaysia.
pros_text: Still among the top 5 bank in Malaysia due to the government back up
review_body_text: One of the top 5 bank in Malaysia. Unfortunately top management change few times and as a result to that the bank has"duplicate" departments which caused time frame for approval in may ways.It is still one of the "anchor" bank in Malaysia due to the government back up through the government link company - Employee Provident Fund (EPF) as the major shareholder of the bank. The bank does not compensate the workers so well and as a result to that many good workers had left the bank. I dont have any good or enjoyable time with the bank except my work satisfaction setting up a new business center and led the center to be the new best branch in 2009.
review_title: One of the top 5 bank due to government back up

sentence_text: There is no typical day as such, but monitoring the current trust, tax and estate planning development on a weekly basis is vital.
review_body_text: There is no typical day as such, but monitoring the current trust, tax and estate planning development on a weekly basis is vital. Every day is different: one day you might be out seeing clients, perhaps reviewing their personal situation or entertaining them with a day at the golf tournament. The next day you could be in the office, documenting transactions, drumming up new business and dealing with clients by a face to face meeting. My clients are in the range of high net worth and ultra high net worth. They won't consume their wealth in their lifetimes, and they tend to be extremely conservative and careful when passing down their wealth to the next generations. I'm like a doctor on call 24/7. We're dealing with the wealthiest people in the world … if they call you up and ask you a question, and you're not prepared, your credibility and the credibility of the Company is hurt. Once they trust you, they're our best source of new clients and it is really a good and satisfied feeling when these happens.
review_title: A good ground to learn from operation to management level

sentence_text: As people know, CIMB Investment Bank is adamant to become the biggest and successful South East Asia's M&A and corporate finance business including Hong Kong, China, and Australia.
review_body_text: As people know, CIMB Investment Bank is adamant to become the biggest and successful South East Asia's M&A and corporate finance business including Hong Kong, China, and Australia. Apart from investment banking, CIMB commercial banking already set a foothold in every country in South East Asia. Very recent opening was Myanmar and Phillipines. Thus, embracing the expansion is easy to say than done. As part of CIMB Investment Bank, my team also also has to play a role. Understanding the management's load of work can be very helpful. With the experience i have had during my stint in several local securities firm, i manage to keep the workflow smoothly without interfering much on his workload where the bottom line will explain everything, of course with god's will. So i did learn when client database is getting bigger or whenever i foresee big trading volume, getting the client unsatisfied is the last thing you want to do. In the otherwise, by ensuring them satisfaction, every level in the management will be very happy in what i do. While my co-worker are team oriented, it will add more value when i keep guiding them and at the same time take guidance from the experience one. I dont know where this people will end up later, so by giving them my best is my best bet. My hardest part of the job is working in odd hours (handling U.S and U.K trades) and most enjoyable part of the job is the learning curve, good pays and good bonus, of course at god's will.

sentence_text: A day in CIMB Bank can easily be likened to that of a normal office wherein customer's are a priority.
pros_text: low interest for loans, preferential fixed deposit rates, preferential remittance rates, medical benefits for staff & family members, friendly management
review_body_text: A day in CIMB Bank can easily be likened to that of a normal office wherein customer's are a priority. The day commences with calls to customers to either review existing facilities or market new products to existing or new customers. All staff are guided by Key Performance Indicators KPI) hence one is very much guided by these KPIs which are generally given out based on the individual's key role. review_body_text: Basically, my duties involve liaising with Public Bank's motor vehicle hirers - making telephone calls as a gentle reminder for them to make payment. In cases of default payment, we need to seek the assistance of repossessors appointed by our Company to repossess the motor vehicle from our hirer. I would say this is the hardest part of my job.
review_title: Quite a conducive and friendly office environment.
